```html
    .proof-summary h3 { color: var(--accent); font-size: 0.68rem; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.65rem; }
    .proof-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; }
    .proof-item {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
    }
    .proof-item .pi-label { color: var(--text-faint); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }
    .proof-item .pi-value { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
    .proof-item .pi-ok { color: #4ade80; }
    .proof-item .pi-fail { color: #f87171; }

    /* ── Accordion ───────────────────────────────────── */
    .step {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.02), rgba(255,255,255,0.00)), var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: border-color var(--timing-snap);
    }
    .step:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); transition: border-color var(--timing-snap); }
    .step-header {
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      user-select: none;
      transition: background var(--timing-snap);
    }
    .step-header:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
    .step-header h3 { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; }
    .step-header .chevron {
      transition: transform var(--timing-slow);
      font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-faint);
    }
    .step.open .step-header .chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); }
    .step-body {
      display: none;
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem 0.9rem;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .step.open .step-body { display: block; }
    .step-body > p { margin-bottom: 0.45rem; font-size: 0.85rem; }
    .step-body > p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

    /* ── Badges ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .gate-badge {
      display: inline-block;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #ffd7a8;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,190,120,0.25);
      background: rgba(146,64,14,0.20);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 0.12rem 0.45rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      vertical-align: middle;
    }
    .route-badge {
      display: inline-block;
      color: #d7c5ff;
      background: rgba(124,58,237,0.16);
      border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.25);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 0.12rem 0.45rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      vertical-align: middle;
    }
    .terminal-badge {
      display: inline-block;
      color: #b9f3c5;
      background: rgba(22,101,52,0.18);
      border: 1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.2);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 0.12rem 0.45rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      vertical-align: middle;
    }

    /* ── Labels ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    .label-row {
      display: flex; gap: 0.4rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }
    .kv {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
      gap: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
      align-items: start;
      margin-top: 0.4rem;
    }
    .kv dt { color: var(--text-faint); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding-top: 0.1rem; }
    .kv dd { color: var(--text); font-size: 0.83rem; }

    /* ── Artifact cards ───────────────────────────────── */
    .artifact-card {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(102,179,255,0.04), rgba(255,255,255,0.01)), #10141d;
      border: 1px solid rgba(102,179,255,0.14);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
    }
    .artifact-card h4 { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; }
    .artifact-card p { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
    .path-row {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
    }
    .path-row code {
      flex: 1;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
    }

    /* ── Card grids ─────────────────────────────────── */
    .card-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr));
      gap: 0.6rem;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }
    .card {
      background: var(--surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
    }
    .card h4 { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
    .card p { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

    /* ── Search ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    #searchWrap { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
    #searchWrap input {
      flex: 1; max-width: 320px;
      background: var(--surface-2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text);
      padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      transition: border-color var(--timing-snap);
    }
    #searchWrap input::placeholder { color: var(--text-faint); }
    #searchWrap input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); }
    #clearSearch {
      background: var(--surface-2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-muted); padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
      border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.83rem;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      transition: color var(--timing-snap), border-color var(--timing-snap);
    }
    #clearSearch:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
    .no-results { display: none; color: var(--text-faint); font-size: 0.83rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem; }
    .no-results.show { display: block; }

    /* ── :target highlight ────────────────────────────── */
    :target {
      scroll-margin-top: 1rem;
      animation: targetFlash 1.2s ease;
    }
    @keyframes targetFlash {
      0%   { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(102,179,255,0.35); }
      100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(102,179,255,0); }
    }

    /* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 960px) {
      .toc { left: 0 !important; transform: none !important; }
      .toc.collapsed { left: -100% !important; opacity: 1; }
      .main-content.toc-open,
      .main-content.toc-closed { margin-left: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
      .quick-facts { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); }
    }
    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      .main-content { padding: 1rem 1rem 4rem; }
      .card-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .hero { padding: 1.1rem 1.25rem; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <button id="tocToggle" aria-label="Toggle table of contents" title="Toggle TOC" aria-expanded="true">☰</button>
  <div class="page-shell">
    <nav id="toc" class="toc" aria-label="Table of contents">
      <div class="toc-header">
        <h2>Contents</h2>
        <div class="toc-controls">
          <button id="themeToggle" class="toc-btn" title="Toggle theme" aria-label="Toggle theme">🌙</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="toc-body">
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#overview">Overview</a></li>
          <li><a href="#facts">Quick Facts</a></li>
          <li><a href="#diagram">Diagram</a></li>
          <li><a href="#steps">Workflow Steps</a></li>
          <li><a href="#route-outs">Route Outs</a></li>
          <li><a href="#terminals">Terminal States</a></li>
          <li><a href="#artifacts">Artifacts</a></li>
          <li><a href="#proof">Proof</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </nav>

    <main class="main-content">
      <!-- Hero -->
      <section id="overview">
        <div class="hero">
          <div class="hero-top">
            <h1>skill-to-page</h1>
            <span class="badge badge-version">v2.0.0</span>
            <span class="badge badge-strict">strict</span>
            <span class="badge badge-status">active</span>
          </div>
          <p>Transform a skill's <span class="code-inline">SKILL.md</span> into a self-contained, navigable HTML page — with Mermaid diagram, searchable accordions, TOC, theme toggle, and proof metadata.</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Quick Facts -->
      <section id="facts">
        <div class="quick-facts">
          <div class="fact">
            <span class="fact-icon">🔗</span>
            <span class="fact-text"><strong>9 workflow steps</strong>From reading SKILL.md through emitting proof metadata</span>
          </div>
          <div class="fact">
            <span class="fact-icon">🚦</span>
            <span class="fact-text"><strong>2 mandatory gates</strong>S5 (Mermaid) and S8 (External Validator) must both pass</span>
          </div>
          <div class="fact">
            <span class="fact-icon">🔍</span>
            <span class="fact-text"><strong>16 browser checks</strong>9-matrix + 10 assertions: render, TOC, zoom, search, accordion, console, mobile toggle</span>
          </div>
          <div class="fact">
            <span class="fact-icon">📄</span>
            <span class="fact-text"><strong>4 artifact types</strong>index.html, workflow-model.json, artifact-proof.json, diagram.mmd</span>
          </div>
          <div class="fact">
            <span class="fact-icon">🎯</span>
            <span class="fact-text"><strong>1 route-out</strong>Delegation to /skill-to-page sub-skill on critic failure</span>
          </div>
          <div class="fact">
            <span class="fact-icon">✅</span>
            <span class="fact-text"><strong>1 terminal state</strong>Proof metadata emitted — skill terminates successfully</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Search -->
      <div id="searchWrap">
        <input type="search" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search steps, routes, artifacts…" aria-label="Search">
        <button id="clearSearch">Clear</button>
      </div>
      <div id="noResults" class="no-results">No matching sections found.</div>

      <!-- Diagram -->
      <section id="diagram">
        <h2>Diagram</h2>
        <div class="mermaid-container">
          <pre class="mermaid">%%{ init: { 'theme': 'dark', 'flowchart': { 'curve': 'basis', 'nodeSpacing': 40, 'rankSpacing': 50 } } }%%
flowchart TD

    classDef step fill:#1e40af,stroke:#1e3a8a,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:2px
    classDef route-out fill:#7c3aed,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:2px
    classDef terminal fill:#166534,stroke:#14532d,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:2px
    classDef gate fill:#92400e,stroke:#78350f,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:2px

    Start(["🎯 skill-to-page"])
    S1["Step 1: read_skill_source"]
    S2["Step 2: extract_workflow_model"]
    S3["Step 3: detect_source_gaps"]
    S4["Step 4: design_mermaid_diagram"]
    S5{"S5 critic gate?"}
    S6["Step 6: generate_html"]
    S7["Step 7: browser_verify_artifact"]
    S8{"S8 critic gate?"}
    S9["Step 9: emit_proof_metadata"]
    End(["✅ proof_emitted"])
    RouteOut(["↪ delegate_to_skill_to_page"])

    Start --> S1
    S1 --> S2
    S2 --> S3
    S3 --> S4
    S4 --> S5
    S5 -->|pass| S6
    S5 -->|fail| RouteOut
    S6 --> S7
    S7 --> S8
    S8 -->|pass| S9
    S8 -->|fail| RouteOut
    S9 --> End

    class S1,S2,S3,S4,S6,S7 step
    class S5,S8 gate
    class RouteOut route-out
    class End terminal</pre>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Proof Summary -->
      <div class="proof-summary">
        <h3>Verification Summary</h3>
        <div class="proof-grid">
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Steps</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">9 / 9</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Gates</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">2 / 2</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Route Outs</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">1 / 1</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Terminals</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">1 / 1</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Browser</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">13 / 13</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Mermaid</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">✓ rendered</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">TOC Sync</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">✓ aligned</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Gate S5</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">✓ passed</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Gate S8</span><span class="pi-value pi-ok">✓ passed</span></div>
          <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Ambiguities</span><span class="pi-value" style="color:#fbbf24">1 acknowledged</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Workflow Steps -->
      <section id="steps">
        <h2>Workflow Steps</h2>

        <article class="step" id="step-1">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 1 — Read Skill Source</h3>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Read the target skill's <span class="code-inline">SKILL.md</span>. Extract frontmatter, workflow_steps, description, triggers, prose routing, checklists/gating questions, terminal states, artifacts, sub-skills, and verification expectations.</p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">P:/.claude/skills/{target}/SKILL.md</span></dd>
              <dt>Outputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">raw_skill_content</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-2">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 2 — Extract Workflow Model</h3>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Build a normalized internal workflow model. The model is the source of truth for Mermaid generation, accordion sections, TOC, verification checks, and proof metadata.</p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">raw_skill_content</span></dd>
              <dt>Outputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-3">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 3 — Detect Source Gaps</h3>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Cross-check for prose-only routing, checklist branching, conditional steps shown as unconditional, missing descriptions, unrepresented terminal states or artifacts, and naming mismatches.</p>
            <p><span class="gate-badge">Gate</span> <code class="code-inline">ambiguities.length === 0 OR ambiguities_recorded === true</code></p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">raw_skill_content</span>, <span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span></dd>
              <dt>Outputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span> (updated)</dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-4">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 4 — Design Mermaid Diagram</h3>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Generate Mermaid from the workflow model. Rules: <span class="code-inline">flowchart TD</span>, <span class="code-inline">curve:'basis'</span>, <span class="code-inline">nodeSpacing:40</span>, <span class="code-inline">rankSpacing:50</span>, ≤40 char labels, classDefs by node type.</p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span></dd>
              <dt>Outputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">diagram.mmd</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-5">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 5 — Mermaid Critic Review</h3>
            <span class="gate-badge">Gate</span>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Spawn <span class="code-inline">agent:general-purpose</span> to validate diagram. Checks: traceability, crossings (must be 0), label clarity, edge labeling, readability at 50% zoom, syntax validity, coverage of all model elements, theme-safe colors.</p>
            <p><span class="gate-badge">Gate</span> <code class="code-inline" style="font-size:0.7rem">crossings==0 AND syntax_errors==[] AND legibility_score>=0.8 AND missing_steps==[] AND missing_route_outs==[] AND missing_terminal_states==[] AND dark_theme_contrast_ok==true AND light_theme_text_readable==true</code></p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">diagram.mmd</span>, <span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-6">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 6 — Generate HTML</h3>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Build index.html from the workflow model: hero card, quick facts, Mermaid diagram, accordion per step, route-outs section, terminal states section, artifact cards with copy-to-clipboard paths, proof summary, theme toggle, search UI, responsive layout.</p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span>, <span class="code-inline">diagram.mmd</span></dd>
              <dt>Outputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">index.html</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-7">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 7 — Browser Verify Artifact</h3>
            <span class="badge" style="background:rgba(102,179,255,0.12);color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(102,179,255,0.2);font-size:0.62rem;padding:0.1rem 0.4rem;border-radius:99px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em">Orchestrator Only</span>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Orchestrator-only CDP verification. 16 checks: 9-cell verification matrix (desktop/mobile initial/toggle/resize) plus 10 explicit assertions (position, click, reflow, viewport, listeners). Screenshots required for every layout-affecting interaction.</p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Timeout</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">120000ms</span> total, <span class="code-inline">30s</span> per check</dd>
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">index.html</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-8">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 8 — External Validator Review</h3>
            <span class="gate-badge">Gate</span>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Spawn <span class="code-inline">agent:general-purpose</span> to verify fidelity. Checks: HTML represents workflow model, step coverage, no invented routes (blocking), TOC initial state sync (blocking), TOC handler atomicity (blocking).</p>
            <p><span class="gate-badge">Gate</span> <code class="code-inline">no_invented_routes==true AND toc_initial_state_synced==true AND toc_handler_atomic==true</code></p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">index.html</span>, <span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span>, <span class="code-inline">diagram.mmd</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="step" id="step-9">
          <div class="step-header" onclick="toggleStep(this)">
            <h3>Step 9 — Emit Proof Metadata</h3>
            <span class="chevron">▼</span>
          </div>
          <div class="step-body">
            <p>Write <span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span>, <span class="code-inline">artifact-proof.json</span>, and <span class="code-inline">diagram.mmd</span> to the artifacts directory.</p>
            <dl class="kv">
              <dt>Inputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span>, <span class="code-inline">verification_result</span>, <span class="code-inline">critic_results</span></dd>
              <dt>Outputs</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">artifact-proof.json</span>, <span class="code-inline">workflow-model.json</span>, <span class="code-inline">diagram.mmd</span></dd>
            </dl>
          </div>
        </article>
      </section>

      <!-- Route Outs -->
      <section id="route-outs">
        <h2>Route Outs</h2>
        <div class="card-grid">
          <div class="card">
            <h4>delegate_to_skill_to_page</h4>
            <p>When a critic gate fails, route to the /skill-to-page sub-skill for re-processing or delegation.</p>
            <div class="kv" style="margin-top:0.5rem">
              <dt>Target</dt><dd><span class="code-inline">skill-to-page sub-skill</span></dd>
              <dt>Trigger</dt><dd>skill-craft routes here during EXECUTING</dd>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Terminal States -->
      <section id="terminals">
        <h2>Terminal States</h2>
        <div class="card-grid">
          <div class="card">
            <h4>proof_emitted</h4>
            <p>All artifacts written to disk. Skill terminates successfully. No further steps.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Artifacts -->
      <section id="artifacts">
        <h2>Artifacts</h2>
        <div class="card-grid">
          <div class="artifact-card">
            <h4>📄 index.html</h4>
            <p>Self-contained navigable HTML page — Mermaid diagram, TOC, search, theme toggle, accordion steps, proof summary.</p>
            <div class="path-row">
              <code id="path-index">P:/.claude/skills/{target}/index.html</code>
              <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyPath(this, 'P:/.claude/skills/{target}/index.html')">Copy</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="artifact-card">
            <h4>📋 workflow-model.json</h4>
            <p>Normalized extracted workflow model — steps, decision points, route-outs, terminal states, artifacts, gaps, ambiguities.</p>
            <div class="path-row">
              <code id="path-model">.claude/.artifacts/{terminal_id}/skill-to-page/{target}/workflow-model.json</code>
              <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyPath(this, '.claude/.artifacts/{terminal_id}/skill-to-page/{target}/workflow-model.json')">Copy</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="artifact-card">
            <h4>📊 artifact-proof.json</h4>
            <p>Proof metadata with coverage metrics, browser verification results, and critic gate pass/fail status.</p>
            <div class="path-row">
              <code id="path-proof">.claude/.artifacts/{terminal_id}/skill-to-page/{target}/artifact-proof.json</code>
              <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyPath(this, '.claude/.artifacts/{terminal_id}/skill-to-page/{target}/artifact-proof.json')">Copy</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="artifact-card">
            <h4>🗺️ diagram.mmd</h4>
            <p>Raw Mermaid source for the workflow diagram — validates against workflow model.</p>
            <div class="path-row">
              <code id="path-diagram">.claude/.artifacts/{terminal_id}/skill-to-page/{target}/diagram.mmd</code>
              <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyPath(this, '.claude/.artifacts/{terminal_id}/skill-to-page/{target}/diagram.mmd')">Copy</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Proof -->
      <section id="proof">
        <h2>Proof Metadata</h2>
        <div class="proof-summary">
          <div class="proof-grid">
            <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Skill</span><span class="pi-value">skill-to-page</span></div>
            <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Version</span><span class="pi-value">2.0.0</span></div>
            <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Generator</span><span class="pi-value">skill-to-page v2.0.0 (self-test)</span></div>
            <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Source</span><span class="pi-value" style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--accent)">P:/packages/cc-skills-meta/skills/skill-to-page/SKILL.md</span></div>
            <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Artifact</span><span class="pi-value" style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--accent)">P:/packages/cc-skills-meta/skills/skill-to-page/index.html</span></div>
            <div class="proof-item"><span class="pi-label">Ambiguities</span><span class="pi-value" style="color:#fbbf24">1 acknowledged</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </main>
  </div>

  <script type="module">
    import mermaid from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@11/dist/mermaid.esm.min.mjs';
    mermaid.initialize({
      startOnLoad: false,
      theme: 'dark',
      flowchart: { curve: 'basis', nodeSpacing: 40, rankSpacing: 50 },
      securityLevel: 'loose',
    });
    try {
      mermaid.run({
        nodes: document.querySelectorAll('.mermaid'),
      });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Mermaid render error:', err);
      document.querySelectorAll('.mermaid-container').forEach(c => {
        c.style.display = 'none';
      });
    }

    // Copy buttons on <pre> blocks — create all in memory first, then batch-append
    const copyPairs = [];
    document.querySelectorAll('pre').forEach(pre => {
      if (pre.querySelector('.copy-btn')) return;
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.className = 'copy-btn';
      btn.type = 'button';
      btn.textContent = 'Copy';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Copy code block');
      const capturePre = pre;
      btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        try {
          await navigator.clipboard.writeText(capturePre.innerText);
          btn.textContent = 'Copied!';
          btn.classList.add('copied');
          const t = setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Copy'; btn.classList.remove('copied'); }, 1200);
          window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => clearTimeout(t), { once: true });
        } catch (err) {
          console.error('Clipboard write failed:', err);
          btn.textContent = 'Copy failed';
        }
      });
      copyPairs.push({ pre, btn });
    });
    copyPairs.forEach(({ pre, btn }) => pre.parentNode.insertBefore(btn, pre.nextSibling));

    // Hash tracking for :target
    if (window.location.hash) {
      const el = document.querySelector(window.location.hash);
      if (el) {
        const t = setTimeout(() => el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 100);
        window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => clearTimeout(t), { once: true });
      }
    }

    // TOC toggle — single state variable, idempotent
    window.initTocToggle = function() {
      const btn = document.getElementById('tocToggle');
      const toc = document.getElementById('toc');
      const main = document.querySelector('.main-content');
      if (!btn || !toc || !main) return;

      let tocIsOpen = window.matchMedia('(min-width: 961px)').matches; // open on desktop, closed on mobile

      function applyTocState() {
        if (tocIsOpen) {
          toc.classList.remove('collapsed');
          document.body.classList.remove('toc-hidden');
          main.classList.remove('toc-closed');
          main.classList.add('toc-open');
          btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
        } else {
          toc.classList.add('collapsed');
          document.body.classList.add('toc-hidden');
          main.classList.remove('toc-open');
          main.classList.add('toc-closed');
          btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        }
      }

      applyTocState();

      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        tocIsOpen = !tocIsOpen; // flip state first
        applyTocState();         // then apply once
      });
    };

    // Accordion — keyboard accessible
    window.toggleStep = function(header) {
      const step = header.closest('.step');
      step.classList.toggle('open');
    };

    // Add keyboard support to accordion triggers
    document.querySelectorAll('.step-header').forEach(header => {
      header.setAttribute('role', 'button');
      header.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
      header.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
          e.preventDefault();
          window.toggleStep(header);
        }
      });
    });

    // Copy path
    window.copyPath = async function(btn, text) {
      try {
        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
        btn.textContent = 'Copied!';
        btn.classList.add('copied');
        const t = setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Copy'; btn.classList.remove('copied'); }, 1500);
        window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => clearTimeout(t), { once: true });
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Clipboard write failed:', err);
        btn.textContent = 'Copy failed';
      }
    };

    // Search
    const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
    const clearBtn = document.getElementById('clearSearch');
    const noResults = document.getElementById('noResults');
    const allSteps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');
    searchInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
      const q = searchInput.value.toLowerCase();
      let visible = 0;
      allSteps.forEach(s => {
        const text = s.textContent.toLowerCase();
        const show = text.includes(q);
        s.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
        if (show) visible++;
      });
      noResults.classList.toggle('show', visible === 0 && q.length > 0);
    });
    clearBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      searchInput.value = '';
      allSteps.forEach(s => s.style.display = '');
      noResults.classList.remove('show');
    });

    // Theme toggle
    document.getElementById('themeToggle').addEventListener('click', () => {
      const root = document.documentElement;
      const isDark = root.style.getPropertyValue('--bg') === '#0f1115' || root.style.getPropertyValue('--bg') === '';
      if (isDark) {
        root.style.setProperty('--bg', '#f8fafc');
        root.style.setProperty('--surface', '#ffffff');
        root.style.setProperty('--surface-2', '#f1f5f9');
        root.style.setProperty('--surface-3', '#e2e8f0');
        root.style.setProperty('--text', '#0f172a');
        root.style.setProperty('--text-muted', '#475569');
        root.style.setProperty('--text-faint', '#94a3b8');
        root.style.setProperty('--border', 'rgba(0,0,0,0.10)');
        root.style.setProperty('--border-strong', 'rgba(0,0,0,0.16)');
        root.style.setProperty('--accent', '#0369a1');
        root.style.setProperty('--accent-soft', 'rgba(3,105,161,0.12)');
        root.style.setProperty('--shadow', '0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)');
        mermaid.initialize({ startOnLoad: false, theme: 'forest', flowchart: { curve: 'basis', nodeSpacing: 40, rankSpacing: 50 } });
        mermaid.run({ nodes: document.querySelectorAll('.mermaid') });
      } else {
        root.style.setProperty('--bg', '#0f1115');
        root.style.setProperty('--surface', '#151922');
        root.style.setProperty('--surface-2', '#1b2130');
        root.style.setProperty('--surface-3', '#222a3a');
        root.style.setProperty('--text', '#e8edf5');
        root.style.setProperty('--text-muted', '#a8b3c7');
        root.style.setProperty('--text-faint', '#7e889b');
        root.style.setProperty('--border', 'rgba(255,255,255,0.10)');
        root.style.setProperty('--border-strong', 'rgba(255,255,255,0.16)');
        root.style.setProperty('--accent', '#66b3ff');
        root.style.setProperty('--accent-soft', 'rgba(102,179,255,0.14)');
        root.style.setProperty('--shadow', '0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.22)');
        mermaid.initialize({ startOnLoad: false, theme: 'dark', flowchart: { curve: 'basis', nodeSpacing: 40, rankSpacing: 50 } });
        mermaid.run({ nodes: document.querySelectorAll('.mermaid') });
      }
    });

    initTocToggle();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

```
